scripts.generate:icons: node scripts/generate-icons.js && node scripts/generate-android-icons.js && node scripts/generate-ios-icons.js
scripts.cap:sync:remote: node scripts/build-web.js && cross-env CAP_REMOTE=1 npx cap sync
scripts.cap:sync:android: node scripts/build-web.js && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:android:remote: node scripts/build-web.js && cross-env CAP_REMOTE=1 npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:sync:ios: node scripts/build-web.js && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:sync:ios:remote: node scripts/build-web.js && cross-env CAP_REMOTE=1 npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:build:shell: node scripts/build-web.js && npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:build:shell:ios: node scripts/build-web.js && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
